title: TFC Ore Marker: Expanded
description: Are you tired of missing that small piece of ore you desperately need? Than this is the resource pack to ease your search.
body:
A fork based off HermitOwO's resource pack that changes the color of each ore indicator in TFC.

Includes ores from TFC, Firmalife, Metallum and TFC + IE Crossover.

If you want to support me doing more of this stuff in the future I do have a Ko-fi page: https://ko-fi.com/quizer9o8
